forager.model.object.ressource

Class MultiRessource

  • java.lang.Object
    • forager.model.FixedObject
      • forager.model.object.Harvestable
        • forager.model.object.ressource.MultiRessource
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    QuadTreeElement

    public class MultiRessource
extends Harvestable
    A version of object who contained multiple ressource

    Not used at the moment
